settings.support_note: Start with the role that feels closest: Travel Hub for portability, Multimedia Hub for everyday balance, and Pro Dock for the permanent desk.

settings.heading: Choose the EZQuest setup that fits the way you work
settings.copy: Start with the role that matches the setup: most portable, most balanced, or most desk-ready. Go deeper only when one option is still close.
settings.source_note: Choose the role first. Use compatibility and support to confirm the final fit.

settings.heading: Need one last check before you choose?
settings.copy: Move into support or compatibility without losing the decision context.
